faq.title: Video to Prompt Generator FAQ
faq.description: Answers for teams who want to get prompt from video quickly and improve AI video prompt quality.
faq.tip: Need implementation help? Talk to support

items.question: How do I get prompt from video in one run?
items.answer: Upload a reference clip, then the system outputs a full package: master prompt, short prompt, negative prompt, keyword tags, and shot list.

items.question: Can this video prompt generator work with different input formats?
items.answer: Yes. You can upload MP4, WebM, MOV, AVI, and MKV, or provide a public video URL.

items.question: Can I generate AI video prompts in Chinese and English?
items.answer: Yes. Output language follows your current site language so teams can build bilingual prompt libraries.

items.question: How is credit usage calculated for video to prompt jobs?
items.answer: Credit cost is estimated mainly from video duration and analysis complexity, and the estimate is shown before you run.

items.question: Can I use prompt from video output in other tools?
items.answer: Yes. Output is plain text and designed for direct copy into Runway, Kling, Pika, Sora, and internal generation workflows.

items.question: Is this suitable for team collaboration?
items.answer: Yes. Teams use Video to Prompt to standardize prompt language, reduce ambiguity, and speed up campaign iteration.
